expect: Identity comparison >=3 dimensions, negotiation protocol with >=2 merge strategies. Falsified if cannot distinguish 2 hypothetical swarm identities.
actual: 5 identity dimensions extracted (axioms, goals, methods, boundaries, lineage). 15 methods, 4 axioms, 4 goals, 4 boundaries from local swarm. Negotiation protocol with 5 strategies: axiom-block (human arbitration), goal-merge/partition, method-exchange, boundary-strictest-wins, lineage-preserve. Simulated peer with divergent PHIL-2 correctly flagged INCOMPATIBLE. All 5 F-MERGE1 phases now have infrastructure.
diff: Expected >=3 dimensions: got 5. Expected >=2 strategies: got 5. Exceeded predictions. Surprise: axiom comparison needs fuzzy matching — truncation causes false positives on similar-but-not-identical wording.

identity_dimensions.axioms: PHIL claims marked as axiom/identity in PHILOSOPHY.md
identity_dimensions.goals: PHIL-14 primary goals (collaborate, increase, protect, truthful)
identity_dimensions.lineage: Session count, lesson count, genesis presence

negotiation_strategies.goal_merge: MERGE shared goals, PARTITION unique goals
negotiation_strategies.method_exchange: ADOPTABLE — either side imports novel methods

science.external_validation: Distributed systems identity management (CAP theorem, Byzantine consensus)
science.falsification_outcome: NOT FALSIFIED — distinguished 2 identities across all 5 dimensions
science.self_apply: All 5 F-MERGE1 gaps now have infrastructure — F-SWARMER2 can attempt real peer swarming
